art_highlights: Global art market grew 4% in 2025 to $59.6 billion, signaling recovery.
Trend: Shift toward sustainability, digital-physical fusion, and emotional resonance in art for 2026.
Art fairs are a major channel, accounting for 35% of dealer sales, a post-2022 high.
Collectors are prioritizing quality, provenance, and 'blue-chip' historical works.

market_trends.summary: Cautiously optimistic outlook for 2026, with a focus on private sales and in-person experiences.
key_points: US leads with 44% market share ($26B); UK at 18%, China at 14%.
Public auction sales grew 9% to $20.7 billion, while dealer sales rose 2% to $34.8 billion.
Online-only sales softened to 15% of market value, favoring in-person channels.
Dealers remain cautiously optimistic (43% expect growth in 2026) amidst geopolitical volatility.
